title: Let’s Connect
text:
Professional Interests


I am open to professional networking, academic collaboration, and opportunities related to business analytics, marketing analytics, project management, and cloud-based analytics.

title: Projects
text:
The projects below highlight my coursework and technical development in analytics, visualization, cloud computing, and project management.






Area: Web Analytics, Business Analytics, Portfolio Development


Tools: GitHub, Quarto, Python, Tableau, analytics reporting


This team project represents collaborative course work in AD 688. The project involved working in a shared GitHub repository, organizing analysis files, developing portfolio-related analytics content, and communicating technical work in a professional format.


View Team GitHub Repository


Team Project GitHub Quarto Analytics









Area: Marketing Analytics


Tools: Tableau, Python, statistical testing


In AD 654 Marketing Analytics, I analyzed customer and campaign data using summary statistics, Tableau dashboards, clustering, and A/B testing. One project compared email image performance using click-through rate, CTA response rate, conversion rate, and unsubscribe rate.


Marketing Analytics A/B Testing Tableau









Area: Customer Analytics


Tools: K-means clustering, standardization, interpretation


I used K-means clustering to segment customer data based on behavior, spending, visit patterns, and engagement indicators. The project included data preparation, model selection, cluster interpretation, and business recommendations.


Clustering Segmentation Business Insights









Area: Cloud Computing


Tools: AWS EC2, VPC, EBS, RDS, Lambda, ELB, Auto Scaling, Elastic Beanstalk


I completed AWS Cloud Foundations labs covering major cloud services and deployment concepts. These labs helped me understand cloud infrastructure, networking, storage, serverless computing, and basic deployment workflows.


AWS EC2 Lambda Cloud Foundations









Area: Personal Portfolio and Web Publishing


Tools: Quarto, GitHub Pages, HTML, CSS


This portfolio website was built with Quarto and hosted through GitHub Pages. It presents my academic background, technical projects, CV, and contact information in a clear professional format for employers and networking.


Portfolio Quarto GitHub Pages

title: Lutong Wen
text:
Boston University MET Portfolio




I am a Boston University Metropolitan College student in Applied Business Analytics with a background in project management, marketing analytics, web analytics, and cloud computing.


This portfolio highlights my academic projects, technical skills, CV, and contact information. My current career interests include business analytics, marketing analytics, cloud-based analytics, and data-driven program management.


View Projects View CV

title: Lutong Wen
text:
Portfolio Focus





Business Analytics


Using data to support business decisions, identify patterns, and communicate practical insights.








Marketing and Web Analytics


Analyzing customer behavior, campaign performance, A/B testing results, and digital engagement.








Project Management


Connecting analytics work with planning, stakeholder communication, risk management, and business value.








Cloud Foundations


Building familiarity with AWS services, deployment basics, and cloud-based technical workflows.

title: Lutong Wen
text:
Featured Skills

Python SQL Tableau GitHub Quarto AWS Marketing Analytics Project Management

title: Professional Introduction
text:
About Me




My name is Lutong Wen, and I am currently pursuing a Master of Science in Applied Business Analytics at Boston University Metropolitan College. I also completed a Master of Science in Project Management at Boston University MET.


My academic and professional interests focus on business analytics, marketing analytics, data visualization, cloud computing, and project management. I am especially interested in using data to support business decisions, improve customer understanding, and communicate insights clearly.

title: Professional Introduction
text:
Academic and Career Interests



Business Analytics


I am interested in using data to identify patterns, evaluate business problems, and support practical decision-making.




Marketing and Web Analytics


My coursework has helped me analyze customer behavior, campaign performance, A/B testing results, and digital engagement.




Cloud and Technical Skills


I have practiced using tools such as Python, SQL, Tableau, GitHub, Quarto, and AWS through academic projects and labs.




Project Management


My project management background helps me organize work, communicate clearly, understand stakeholder needs, and connect analysis to business value.

title: Professional Introduction
text:
Personal Brand


My portfolio reflects two connected areas: analytics and project management. I want my work to show that I can not only analyze data, but also organize tasks, explain results, and connect findings to real business needs.

title: CV and Professional Background
text:

title: CV and Professional Background

Professional Background Summary


I have an academic background in Applied Business Analytics and Project Management. My experience includes graduate-level analytics projects, GitHub-based portfolio development, AWS lab work, Tableau dashboards, and project management coursework.

title: CV and Professional Background
text:
Experience Highlights


At Boston University, I have worked as a Graduate Teaching Assistant, Operations Assistant, and Special Events Assistant. These roles helped me build experience in academic support, assignment evaluation, operations coordination, event support, communication, and time-sensitive task management.


My project management background helps me connect technical analytics work with planning, communication, stakeholder needs, and practical business value.
